hero.description: SGI VICOBA helps you manage risk and protect what matters most. Join thousands of professionals who trust us every day.

features.title: Built for security and simplicity
features.description: Everything you need to stay protected, without the complexity.

security.title: Enterprise-grade security
security.desc: Bank-level encryption and compliance standards keep your data safe and protected at all times.

access.title: Access control
access.desc: Granular permissions and role-based access ensure the right people see the right information.

fast.title: Fast and reliable
fast.desc: Built for performance. Access your dashboard and manage operations from anywhere, anytime.

pricing.title: Fair pricing that scales with group size
pricing.description: Per-member fee starts at TZS 1,000 and gradually drops to TZS 800 as your group grows. The monthly total is always capped at TZS 60,000.

breakdown.title: Fee Breakdown
breakdown.description: Monthly subscription is based on active member count.

cap.title: Cap Protection
cap.description: You never pay more than the maximum monthly fee.
cap.subtext: Maximum monthly subscription fee per group (cap).
notes: App auto-calculates the correct fee by member count
Small groups pay slightly more per person
Larger groups benefit from lower per-member rates

pricing.fairnessNote: Fair for every group size: smaller groups pay a bit more per member, and as the group grows the per-member fee reduces.

benefits.title: Why teams choose SGI VICOBA
benefits.description: From startups to enterprises, we provide the tools and peace of mind you need to focus on what matters.
items: Dedicated support when you need it

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Create your free account in under a minute. No credit card required.

forbidden.title: Access Restricted
forbidden.description: The web application is restricted to leadership roles. Please use the mobile application to interact with the system.
forbidden.mobileHint: Members should use the SGI VICOBA mobile app for their activities.

legal.pageLead: How SGI Africa processes personal and operational data in connection with the SGI VICOBA platform. This page is the authoritative in-product reference for the current version.
legal.introBody: This document describes our privacy practices for the SGI VICOBA platform. By using the service, you consent to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy, subject to applicable law and any additional terms that apply to your account.

auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials below to continue to your account
auth.registerPrivacyAcknowledgement: By creating an account, you acknowledge our <0>Privacy Policy</0>.
auth.registerDescription: Welcome to SGI VICOBA - Get started, stay secure
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a secure link to reset your password

notifications.resetLinkSent: Password reset link sent to your email
notifications.resetLinkFailed: Failed to send reset link. Try again
notifications.memberAlreadyExists: This user is already a member
notifications.credentialsSendFailed: Failed to send credentials. Try again

common.selectGroupFromDashboard: Select a group from the dashboard to view and manage.
common.selectGroupToView: Select a group from the dashboard to view
common.selectGroupToViewContributions: Select a group from the dashboard to view contributions.
common.selectGroupToViewLoans: Select a group from the dashboard to view and manage loans.
common.selectGroupToViewMeetings: Select a group from the dashboard to view and manage meetings.
common.selectGroupToViewShares: Select a group from the dashboard to view shares.
common.selectGroupToViewPenalties: Select a group from the dashboard to view penalties.
common.selectGroupToViewFunds: Select a group from the dashboard to view and manage fund disbursements.
common.selectGroupToViewSettings: Select a group from the dashboard to view and manage its settings.
common.name: Name

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.createFirstGroup: Create your first group to access contributions, loans, meetings, and members.

members.title: Member Registry
members.searchPlaceholder: Search members by name or phone…
members.getStartedAddMember: Get started by adding your first member. Click "Add member".
members.title: Title
members.memberUploadHint: Choose either a PDF document or an image (JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC, HEIF).
members.sendCredentialsNoPhone: This member has no phone number
members.sendCredentialsInvalidPhone: This member’s phone number is not valid. Update it to an international number (e.g. +255…) before inviting.
members.sendCredentialsNoEmail: This leadership role requires an email address. Add one for this member before inviting.
members.sendCredentialsInvalidEmail: This member’s email address is not valid. Update it before inviting.

contributions.title: Contribution Ledger
contributions.searchPlaceholder: Search by member name or type (savings, jamii)…
contributions.recordFirstContribution: Record your first contribution by clicking the "Add contribution" button above.
contributions.pleaseSelectPenalty: Please select a penalty to pay
contributions.addContributionFailed: Could not add this contribution. Try again.
contributions.penaltyAmountMismatch: Contribution amount ({{contribution}}) must match penalty amount ({{penalty}})

loans.title: Loans
loans.searchPlaceholder: Search by borrower name or status (pending, paid, overdue)…
loans.disburseFirstLoan: Disburse your first loan by clicking "Add loan".
loans.repayAmountInvalid: Enter a valid amount greater than zero.
loans.repayFailed: Could not record repayment. Try again.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.searchPlaceholder: Search by topic, resolutions, attendee name, or status…
meetings.scheduleFirstMeeting: Schedule your first meeting by clicking "Add meeting".
meetings.noMembersInGroup: No members in this group yet.

shares.title: Shares
shares.noMembersInGroup: No members in this group yet.
shares.configureBanner: Once shares are configured for this group, total shares and share price cannot be edited or changed.

penalties.title: Penalties Ledger
penalties.searchPlaceholder: Search by member name, type, or status (paid, unpaid)…
penalties.recordFirstPenalty: Record your first penalty by clicking the "Add penalty" button above.

funds.title: Fund Disbursements
funds.recordContributionsFirst: This group has no available balance. Record contributions first to build up funds before making disbursements.
funds.availableDisbursementInfo: You have {{amount}} available. Record a disbursement when your group meets the requirements below.
funds.disburseBannerShares: The group must have configured shares and at least one member must have purchased shares.
funds.disburseBannerIrreversible: Once a disbursement is completed, it cannot be undone.
funds.disburseBannerTiming: Disbursements are only allowed when today's date is on or after the last day of the group's financial cycle month.
funds.disbursementCompletedHint: Disbursement for this cycle is complete. Recording again is disabled until the system opens the next cycle.
funds.completedNoSnapshotHistory: Snapshot history did not load. Try refreshing the page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.manageGroupSettings: Manage your group settings and preferences
settings.profileDescription: Update your name, contact details, and optionally your password
settings.profileLoadError: Could not load your profile. Please try again later.
settings.passwordChangeHint: Leave both password fields empty to keep your current password. To change it, enter your current password and a new one.
settings.profileUpdateFailed: Could not update your profile. Try again.
settings.updateGroupDetails: Update your group name, location, and type
settings.fetchError: We couldn't fetch this group's details. Please try again later.
settings.legalCardDescription: Read how we collect, use, and protect your data on SGI VICOBA.
